unit.name: Creep
unit.gameplay_identity: Assassin calibration unit carrying Exile, Executioner through one decisive combat silhouette.
unit.strongest_preserved_hook: broken ring of matte scythe-ribbons grown from spine
unit.dominant_prop_or_anatomy: broken ring of matte scythe-ribbons grown from spine
unit.supernatural_cost: each chain execution erases facial contour and identity marks

psychology.core_wound: Its first attempt to join a group ended with every identifying mark used to isolate and reject it.
psychology.private_want: It wants to approach others without ever being named, claimed, or rejected again.
psychology.primary_fear: Recognition will let a group define a boundary and cast it outside once more.
psychology.survival_strategy: It erases every trace that could support recognition, then removes witnesses.
psychology.villainous_distortion: The wish to avoid rejection becomes procedural extermination of anyone capable of remembering it.
psychology.current_emotional_state: Vacant fixation on the weakest witness.
psychology.emotional_contradiction: Residual longing to approach versus absolute refusal to be known.
psychology.face_direction: The smooth erased face and hollow eye apertures are the facial mechanism; no mouth appears, and the slight head cant fixes the weakest witness without human emotion.
psychology.pose_direction: Low loaded limbs point toward the target while the broken blade-ring closes the only escape arc.
psychology.forbidden_read: No cute alien, generic gray, neutral mannequin, decorative tentacle dancer, masked ninja, or merely sad outsider.

visible_face_evidence.feeling: Current feeling is visible as Vacant fixation on the weakest witness.
visible_face_evidence.want: The visible intent supports this private want: It wants to approach others without ever being named, claimed, or rejected again.
visible_face_evidence.fear_or_concealment: The face visibly guards against this fear: Recognition will let a group define a boundary and cast it outside once more.
visible_face_evidence.active_survival_strategy: Face and posture enact this survival strategy: It erases every trace that could support recognition, then removes witnesses.
visible_face_evidence.villainous_read: The visible behavior expresses this distortion: The wish to avoid rejection becomes procedural extermination of anyone capable of remembering it.
visible_face_evidence.cited_visual_cues: Face cue: The smooth erased face and hollow eye apertures are the facial mechanism; no mouth appears, and the slight head cant fixes the weakest witness without human emotion. Pose cue: Low loaded limbs point toward the target while the broken blade-ring closes the only escape arc.

professional_standard.benchmark_comparison: The immutable Round 6 evidence compares creep directly with approved matte Vellum and all eleven calibration peers at master, face, and exact-96 scales.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for creep: The image reads as procedural alien predation, not a mascot, dancer, or masked humanoid.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, creep meets or exceeds the professional floor for audience_and_intent_fit.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for creep: Matte ribbons, dry gray skin, scars, and eye voids are restrained and materially clear.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, creep meets or exceeds the professional floor for craft_and_finish.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for creep: Erased face and incomplete blade ring reinforce one identity-removal concept.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, creep meets or exceeds the professional floor for coherence_and_hierarchy.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for creep: Faceless alien anatomy and broken scythe-ring have no roster collision.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, creep meets or exceeds the professional floor for distinctiveness.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for creep: Silhouettes, master, nonhuman face evidence, and exact 96px derivative are complete.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, creep meets or exceeds the professional floor for completeness_and_downstream_usability.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for creep: The pale head and black broken ring preserve identity and role at exact scale.

critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, creep meets or exceeds the professional floor for psychology_and_villain_read.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for creep: Exile erasure leads; Executioner is localized to one integrated blade-ring system.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, creep meets or exceeds the professional floor for production_feasibility_and_trait_clarity.

professional_standard.rejection_case: The strongest honest rejection case was tested against the native evidence, derivative lineage, anatomy, trait channels, and roster comparisons and did not survive cross-examination.
professional_standard.excellence_gap: Later production may further refine micro-material transitions, but no gap falls below the professional concept-art floor or weakens the locked identity.

cross_examination.outcome: All decisive claims survived the one permitted cross-examination; no unrefuted blocker remains.
